raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased XXXX items ( XXXX XXXX ) from XXXX, later returned XXXX of them in compliance with their return policy, and requested a refund for the XXXX returned items. 
On XX/XX/2024, the merchant credited my account XXXX for XXXX item only ( item 's original price minus prepaid shipping cost I believe, which I don't dispute ). My email inquiry to the merchant remained unanswered, and on XX/XX/2024 I opened a dispute with the credit card company for the remaining XXXX. 
On XX/XX/2024 the credit card company closed the dispute in favor of the merchant and notified me : " A letter detailing your dispute resolution will typically be available in your Notices & Letters within XXXX hours ''. 
As of XXXX, there is no letter addressing my inquiry. My additional request for clarification sent by email to XXXX on XX/XX/2024 remains unanswered.
